headline: Dow Jones Medical Giant J&J Breaks Out; PNC, Iron Mountain, Fortinet In Or Near Buy Zones

headline: Fortinet (FTNT) Stock Could Be A Top Performer This Year Amid Cautious Guidance
summary: Fortinet Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) is one of the 10 AI Stocks That Are Surging. On June 12, Barclays raised its target price for Fortinet Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) stock from $115 to $155 and maintained an Equal Weight rating. The company’s most recent earnings report on May 5 offered a glimpse of the potential that is driving this […]
